_meta.description: Corrected Level-11 order-2/order-3 pair. v1.4 kept intact for audit; see refs/RECURRENCE_CORRECTION_order3.md.
_meta.rule: VISION 6.1 NO-LLM-RECALL — parameters from Gorodetsky arXiv:2102.11839v2 (refs/papers/), not model memory.
_meta.eval_convention: For each recurrence, iterate n from 1: compute u_{n+1} from u_n=s[-1], u_{n-1}=s[-2]. Order-2 init [1, lambda]; order-3 init [1, b].

az_eta_level11.source: Gorodetsky arXiv:2102.11839v2, AZ/Cooper family eq. (1.7); eta row (a,b,c)=(11,5,125), d=0.
az_eta_level11.verification: Sym^2 partner of az_apery_b_level11 verified exact to x^40 via Gorodetsky identity sum_n u'_n w^{n+1} = (-x) F_b(x)^2, w=-x/(1-11x-x^2); see checkers/check_C3_sym2.py (D<->eta).
az_eta_level11.caveat: Recurrence takes negative values from n=13; canonical positive-sporadic identification NOT independently confirmed. See RECURRENCE_CORRECTION_order3.md sec.3 (NEEDS-HUMAN).

az_apery_b_level11.note: Same recurrence as v1.4 zagier_b_level11 (Apery b_n, (A,B,lambda)=(11,-1,3)); only the eval convention (start n=1) is fixed here.
az_apery_b_level11.source: Gorodetsky arXiv:2102.11839v2 eq. (1.5), sequence D = Apery b_n; b_n = sum_k C(n,k)^2 C(n+k,k).
az_apery_b_level11.family_form: (n+1)^2 u_{n+1} = (A n^2 + A n + lambda) u_n - B n^2 u_{n-1}
az_apery_b_level11.verification: Matches closed form sum_k C(n,k)^2 C(n+k,k) term-by-term (checkers/tests/test_refs_recurrences.py).
